name: Hibiscus Lemonade
prompt: Sun-drenched garden party scene: tall glasses of vivid pink hibiscus lemonade with floating magenta flower petals, condensation beads, fresh lemon slices, lush green garden bokeh. Editorial beverage photography, romantic summer elegance, rich saturated pinks and greens, golden hour backlight.

name: Raspberry Mint Lemonade
prompt: Outdoor brunch table under dappled shade: sparkling lemonade swirling with bright red raspberries and vivid spearmint sprigs, crushed ice catching sunlight. Fresh, social, invigorating summer mood, crisp macro details on fruit and herbs.

name: Cherry Limeade
prompt: Nostalgic picnic scene: mason jars of ruby-red cherry limeade with whole cherries and lime wedges on red-checkered cloth, golden afternoon sun. Playful Americana energy, vivid cherry red and zesty lime green, cinematic warmth.

name: Berry Melon
prompt: Peak summer farmers market abundance: overflowing baskets of mixed berries beside juicy cantaloupe and honeydew melon slices, sunbeams through striped market awning. Juicy, vibrant, abundant harvest mood, hyper-real fruit textures.

name: Cinnamon Mint
prompt: Cozy winter cabin morning: steaming mug surrounded by cinnamon sticks, ground cinnamon dust, and bright fresh mint leaves on rustic wood, soft snow visible through window. Warm spice meets cool herbal clarity, amber and green contrast.

name: Wintergreen Spice
prompt: Fireside winter evening: crackling fireplace glow, sprigs of wintergreen leaves with subtle holiday spices (star anise, clove) on stone hearth, snow falling outside window. Cool mint freshness wrapped in warm spice atmosphere.

name: Honey-Ginger
prompt: Calming evening kitchen still life: golden honey dripping from wooden dipper onto fresh ginger root slices, soft candlelight, warm amber tones, wellness ritual mood. Luxurious, soothing, intimate macro food photography.

name: Pomegranate Ginger
prompt: Elegant holiday table: crystal glasses garnished with glistening pomegranate arils and thin ginger slices, twinkling fairy lights bokeh, deep ruby red and warm gold palette. Festive premium entertaining, jewel-toned richness.

name: Watermelon Mojito
prompt: Poolside summer celebration: chunky fresh watermelon cubes, muddled mint leaves, lime wheels, icy aqua splash, bright turquoise pool reflections. Energetic, juicy, refreshing party vibe, saturated summer colors.

name: Pink Lemonade
prompt: Carefree carnival summer memory: frosty pink lemonade in classic glass with lemon twist, cotton-candy pink sky gradient, nostalgic fairground lights bokeh. Sweet, bright, carefree nostalgia without clutter.

name: Strawberry Basil
prompt: Farmers market sophistication: ripe strawberries halved beside glossy fresh basil leaves on marble surface, dewy morning light. Modern herbal-fruit pairing, beauty-counter fresh aesthetic, refined and interesting.

name: Peach Tea
prompt: Lazy porch afternoon: glass of iced peach tea with sun-warmed peach slices floating, wicker chair blur, soft golden haze. Tea-house calm, gentle peach amber and soft green tea tones, leisurely refreshment.

name: Cucumber Melon
prompt: Luxury spa retreat: cucumber water with honeydew melon balls, eucalyptus blur, cool blue-white steam, zen minimal composition. Serene wellness, crisp watery greens and pale melon, rejuvenating calm.

name: Peppermint Mocha
prompt: Holiday coffeehouse indulgence: peppermint mocha with whipped cream, crushed candy cane dust, dark chocolate curl, warm café lights. Festive comfort, rich chocolate brown and cool mint white, cozy December mood.

name: Ginger + Lime Mule
prompt: Copper Moscow mule mug with crushed ice, fiery ginger root, bright lime wedges, effervescent ginger beer splash. Cocktail sophistication, metallic copper gleam, spicy ginger heat and electric lime green.

name: Spiced Apple Cider
prompt: Autumn orchard walk: steaming spiced apple cider in enamel mug, crisp apples on burlap, cinnamon sticks, fallen leaves, misty golden orchard background. Orchard-crisp nostalgia, warm amber spice, October comfort.

name: Cranberry Lime
prompt: Holiday gathering sparkle: tart cranberries bursting with juice, lime zest spirals, fizzy clear ice, festive table bokeh. Bright celebration energy, cranberry crimson and lime chartreuse, Thanksgiving-to-New-Year fresh.

name: Pumpkin Spice
prompt: October cozy comfort: pumpkin spice blend with cinnamon sticks, nutmeg, clove, small pumpkin, knitted sweater texture blur. Iconic fall LE mood, warm orange and brown spice palette, indulgent seasonal nostalgia.

name: Strawberry-Pineapple

name: Orange Creamsicle
prompt: Childhood summer nostalgia elevated: orange creamsicle popsicle melting into creamy vanilla swirl, bright orange and ivory layers, soft sunset glow. Playful nostalgia with adult polish, creamy citrus dream.

name: Blueberry-Lemon
prompt: Morning spa refresh ritual: deep blueberries submerged in sparkling lemon water, morning sun rays, white linen, dew drops. Rejuvenating AM energy, indigo berry and sunny lemon contrast, clean clarity.

name: Coconut-Lime

name: Mango-Berry
prompt: Active lifestyle abundance: ripe mango slices with mixed berries tumbling on wooden board, energetic morning light, farmers market vitality. Natural goodness, mango gold and berry jewel tones, vibrant daily energy.

name: Dragonfruit-Rose

name: Carrot Cake

name: Blackberry-Lavender

name: Pomegranate-Pear

name: Icy Peak Refresh

name: Crystal Whitening Mint

name: Green Tea Fresh

name: Overnight Calm Mint

prompt: Clinical herbal gum-health cue: eucalyptus leaves, tea tree sprigs, fresh mint on clean white clinical surface, crisp daylight. Therapeutic herbal fresh, trustworthy green botanicals, gum wellness.
